form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after five months won by 3 len at Coffs Harbour Ctry Mdn-Sw March 1 over 1010m on a soft track defeating Magic Socks carrying 59kg at $6. Previously second-up eased back early on 7th of 10 at Scone Mdn on June 10 over 1300m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Backward Glance with 56.5kg at $31. Shapes as a leading chance again.
